langchain-ai/deepagents ·GitHub ⭐ 10661 Python · AI Agent, LangGraph, Python, Developer Harness

What it is

Deep Agents is an opinionated, out-of-the-box agent harness built on LangGraph, providing built-in planning, filesystem access, sub-agent delegation, and shell execution.

Problems solved

  • Saves developers from writing extensive boilerplate necessary to wire up prompts
  • tool definitions
  • filesystem capabilities
  • and persistent context management when bootstrapping an autonomous AI agent.

How to get started

Install via pip install deepagents. In Python, initialize with from deepagents import create_deep_agent, then create an instance agent = create_deep_agent() and invoke it: agent.invoke({"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Research LangGraph"}]}).

Detailed report

1. Positioning

langchain-ai/deepagents is positioned as a deep agents is an opinionated, out-of-the-box agent harness built on langgraph, providing built-in planning, filesystem access, sub-agent delegation, and shell execution. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Python-based solution for the batteries-included agent harness. deep agents is an agent harness. an opinionated, ready-to-run agent out of the box.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Saves developers from writing extensive boilerplate necessary to wire up prompts. langchain-ai/deepagents addresses this by deep agents is an opinionated, out-of-the-box agent harness built on langgraph, providing built-in planning, filesystem access, sub-agent delegation, and shell execution, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Python, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around the batteries-included agent harness. deep agents is an agent harness. an opinionated, ready-to-run agent out of the box. The implementation utilizes Python's strengths to provide deep agents is an opinionated, out-of-the-box agent harness built on langgraph, providing built-in planning, filesystem access, sub-agent delegation, and shell execution, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, install via pip install deepagents. in python, initialize with from deepagents import create_deep_agent, then create an instance agent = create_deep_agent() and invoke it: agent.invoke({"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "research langgraph"}]}). This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Python-powered utility that streamlines the batteries-included agent harness. deep agents is an agent harness. an opinionated, ready-to-run agent out of the box; it effectively tackles Saves developers from writing extensive boilerplate necessary to wire up prompts while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
